scene_description: A counter with a large metal bowl, a red toy wagon, and other small items sits against a purple wall.

candidates.rationale: The bowl is visibly devoid of any significant contents, containing only a small utensil or reflection.
The wagon appears structurally sound and intact with all wheels attached and the body undamaged.

scene_description: A robot's view of a kitchen counter featuring a microwave, a large bowl, and two plastic bottles.

candidates.rationale: The door panel of the microwave is flush with the appliance body and visibly latched shut.

candidates.target_object: large plastic bottle with orange label
candidates.rationale: The bottle is nearly empty, containing only a small amount of liquid visible at the very bottom.

scene_description: A workbench holds a closed book, a small keyboard, and various cylindrical and rectangular objects.

candidates.rationale: The covers of the book are touching, indicating it is lying flat and closed.
A white cap is clearly visible secured over the top opening of the container standing upright.

scene_description: A close-up view of a sink area in a workshop or kitchen setting, with a robotic arm partially visible.

candidates.rationale: No water is visibly flowing or dripping from the faucet spout.
The cloth appears dark, saturated, and crumpled, indicating it is soaked or wet.

scene_description: A view of a storage area featuring shelves and a white door with an over-the-door wire organizer holding appliances and cups.

candidates.rationale: The door is visibly ajar and not sealed against the door frame.
The hair dryer's power cord is visible, but the plug is not inserted into a wall outlet.

scene_description: A robotic arm overlooks a utility area with two laundry machines and a window, where various household items are resting on the machines.

candidates.rationale: The top flap of the box is clearly lifted, allowing access to the sheets inside.
The window glass is fully seated within the frame, indicating the window is closed.

scene_description: A robotic arm overlooks a small table holding a wooden box, a toy carrot, a green cloth, and a metal container.

candidates.rationale: The cloth is bunched up and clearly not spread out flat on the table surface.
The red lid is resting securely on top of the wooden box, indicating it is shut.

scene_description: A robot views a detailed grey and black toy kitchen set with a refrigerator, stove, and microwave.

candidates.rationale: The door is visually flush against the appliance body, confirming it is closed.
The oven door is visibly shut and aligned with the surrounding frame of the stove unit.

scene_description: A workbench features a pegboard holding various tools, an open cardboard box containing bubble wrap, and a clear glass.

candidates.rationale: The top flaps of the cardboard box are unfolded, revealing the contents inside.
The jaws of the black pliers hanging on the pegboard are resting in a closed position.

scene_description: A wide-angle view shows a kitchen counter with a stainless steel sink, a faucet, and several objects including bottles and an apple.

candidates.rationale: No water is visibly flowing from the faucet spout into the sink basin.
The apple appears whole and shows no visible signs of damage or cuts.

scene_description: A robot views an open white refrigerator next to a stove in a kitchen.

candidates.rationale: The refrigerator door is visibly swung out and away from the main body of the unit.
The shelves and compartments inside the refrigerator are mostly empty, indicating it is not full.
